data.title: Seremban, Negeri Sembilan
data.description:
Looking for a comfortable and convenient place to stay? Our newly renovated
hostel is the perfect choice! Located just opposite CMH Seremban, we offer a
simple yet cozy environment for students and working adults.
Enjoy these amenities:
1) WiFi and Internet: Stay connected with high-speed internet.
2) Comfortable Beds: Rest easy on our comfortable beds.
3) Hot Water: Enjoy a warm shower anytime.
4) Clean and Hygienic: Our hostel is always clean and well-maintained.
5) Cooking Facilities: Prepare light meals in our kitchen.
6) Parking: Convenient parking is available for your vehicle.
7) Gym Nearby: Stay fit and active with a nearby gym. (additional charges)
8) CCTV Security: Enjoy peace of mind with CCTV cameras installed.
9) Washing Machine: Keep your clothes clean and fresh.
10) Common Area: Relax and unwind in our common area with TV and Netflix.
Book your stay today and experience the best in hostel living!
Prices
1) Small room = RM 450
2) Medium room = RM 520
3) Big room = RM 620
Deposit
- 1 month deposit
Contact info (Whatsapp)
- Billy
Location
- Opposite CMH hospital
*Medium and big rooms can accommodate up to 2 people. An additional fee of RM
100 applies for each extra occupant.*

data.title: Seremban, Negeri Sembilan
data.description:
𝐎𝐩𝐞𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐩𝐭 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐑𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐍𝐞𝐠𝐞𝐫𝐢 𝐒𝐞𝐦𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐚𝐧 | 𝐒𝐩𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐨𝐮𝐬 & 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐜 𝐋𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧
Looking for a spacious and strategically located warehouse for your business operations?
These open-concept warehouse units are ideal for storage, logistics, distribution, and light industrial use. Located in Bandar Seremban Selatan, the property offers excellent accessibility, ample space and strong utility support for business operations.
📍𝐋𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 : Bandar Seremban Selatan, Negeri Sembilan
___________________________________________________________________________________
✅𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬:
✔ Spacious open-concept warehouse layout
✔ Easy access for lorries and containers
✔ Ample parking space for trucks and cars
✔ Suitable for logistics, storage & industrial use
✔ Strong electricity capacity up to 400 AMPS
___________________________________________________________________________________
🏢𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐲 𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬:
• Property Type : Open Concept Warehouse
• Unit / Lot Size : 160 ft × 180 ft = 28,800 sq. ft
• Built-Up Size : Approximately 10,000 sq. ft per unit
• Parking Lot : Ample open parking space for trucks and cars
• Completion Year : 2020
• Units Available : 2 Units
___________________________________________________________________________________
🏢𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐬 & 𝐀𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐬:
• Wide access road
• Nearby main roads and highways
• Located within industrial area
• Close to town and highway access
• Electricity supply (TNB: 60 AMPS up to 400 AMPS)
• Water supply available
• Suitable for warehouse, logistics, storage or light industrial operations
___________________________________________________________________________________
💰𝐑𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐥 𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬:
• Monthly Rent : RM 20,000 per unit (Negotiable)
• Rental Deposit : 3 months rental deposit + 1 month advance rental + 1 month utilities deposit (Negotiable)
___________________________________________________________________________________
📞𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐜𝐭 𝐍𝐨𝐰:
Call / WhatsApp
(Mr Kirba)

Being an end-lot unit, you get a larger built-up and extra land compared to standard intermediate houses. Enjoy better ventilation, excellent natural lighting, and that extra breathing room!
🏡 Spacious Backyard & Parking
Features a generous backyard—perfect for a mini garden, clothes drying area, or a safe outdoor play space.
Ample parking space inside the porch and extra space outside due to the end-lot positioning.
🛡️ Top-Notch 24/7 Security
Your family’s safety is the priority. Located in a fully guarded community with access card entry and regular security patrols.
Strategic & Convenient Location:
✅ 15 - 20 mins to KLIA / KLIA2 (Perfect for airport staff and frequent travelers!)
✅ Short drive distance to the beautiful Sendayan Mosque (Masjid Sri Sendayan).
✅ Just steps away from the neighborhood playground & recreational park—ideal for kids and evening jogs.
✅ Easy access to major highways (PLUS, SPDH), local schools, Matrix Global Schools, and commercial hubs (Sendayan Merchant Square).
Facilities Included:
✍🏻24-hour Security Guardhouse
✍🏻Access Card System
✍🏻Playground & Jogging Track
✍🏻Spacious Backyard
Rental Deposit: 2 Months Security Deposit + 1 Month Advance Rental
Interested? Let’s deal!
Units with extra land like this go fast. For more info or to arrange a viewing, please contact:
📞 Amirul(owner) -
📞Amirah -
